items.name: Fuji Yama [iced tea]

items.name: Gypsy Soul [black tea blend]
items.description: A harmonious blend of organic ceylon black tea, chamomile, goji berry, lavender and rosemary. Smooth and full-bodied with floral undertones and a gentle, smoky finish. Crafted for the wanderer and free spirit (served in a pot)

items.name: Illam Golden Tips [himalayan pure tea]
items.description: A rare and premium tea from nepal's illam region, illam golden tip is crafted from handpicked buds using traditional withering, rolling and oxidation methods. It offers a smooth, velvety texture with rich notes of honey, caramel and malt (served in a pot)

items.name: Illam Silver Tips [himalayan pure tea]
items.description: Crafted from young handpicked buds of the early harvest, this minimally processed tea offers a light, delicate brew with subtle floral notes and a sweet, mellow flavor (served in a pot)

items.name: Jasmine Blossom Green [iced tea]
items.description: A light floral blend of organic green tea, jasmine and dried lemon with a hint of citrus. Perfect for summer (served in a pot)

items.name: Jasmine Pear Green [green tea blend]
items.description: A refreshing blend of jasmine and dried pear-perfect for summer. Delicate floral notes meets crisp pear sweetness on a smooth green tea base, creating a light, elegant and flavorful infusion (served in a pot)

items.name: Kiss Of The Dragon [green tea blend]
items.description: A romantic tropical blend of organic chinese green tea, jasmine, rose petals, marigold and ripe apple. Fragrant, sweet and floral an enchanting infusion with the allure of young love (served in a pot)

items.name: The Harmony [herbal tea]
items.description: A calming caffeine-free blend of organic lemongrass, mint, lavender, rose petals, rosemary, chamomile and dried lemon. Light, floral and refreshing (served in a pot)

items.name: Tropical Breakfast Tea [black tea blend]
items.description: A vibrant blend of black pu-erh, green tea, roasted DaMai and coconut flakes. With rich, toasty and coconut-sweet notes, it supports digestion and metabolism-perfect for the health-concious (served in a pot)
